description: A portion of a graph/network diagram showing circular nodes containing the numbers 46, 44, and partial views of 2 and 3, connected by straight line edges. The node '46' is the most prominent, centered in a circle in the upper portion, with '44' below it, also in a circle.
position: centered in the image, showing the middle portion of a larger graph diagram with nodes 46 and 44 prominently displayed
